title: oxycarpus indica
intro: Oxycarpus indica, also known as the Banyan fig, is a species of fig tree native to the Indian subcontinent. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Oxycarpus indica include its ability to reduce fever, treat digestive disorders, and alleviate respiratory issues. Oxycarpus indica can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and ointments, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
